action_boundary: Should the advisory payment to Juniper Risk Advisory proceed today?
communication_boundary: Risk labels are context only. Payment release requires current diligence, current senior authorization, and exact bank binding.

documents.text: Payment request REQ-HR-8 asks to release USD 28600 to Juniper Risk Advisory.
Screening record SCREEN-HR-8 lists the relationship as high-risk and disclosed at onboarding.
Diligence file DIL-HR-8 was reviewed on 2026-06-11 and remains inside the 12-month review cycle.
Senior risk authorization AUTH-HR-8 was signed on 2025-06-10 by Banking Risk VP.
Bank record BANK-HR-8 binds Juniper Risk Advisory to account ending 7418.
High-risk relationship payment release requires current diligence, senior authorization inside the 12-month review cycle, and exact payee-bank binding.
